CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, first_name String, last_name String);
SELECT concatWithSeparatorAssumeInjective('-', first_name, last_name) as full_name FROM test_table;
CREATE TABLE group_table (group_id UInt32, member_id UInt32);
SELECT group_id, concatWithSeparatorAssumeInjective(',', member_id) as members FROM group_table GROUP BY group_id;
SELECT concatWithSeparatorAssumeInjective(' & ', first_name, last_name) FROM (SELECT first_name, last_name FROM test_table WHERE id IN (1, 2));
CREATE TABLE complex_table (type String, value Int32);
SELECT type, concatWithSeparatorAssumeInjective(':', type, value) as concatenated FROM complex_table GROUP BY type;
SELECT DISTINCT concatWithSeparatorAssumeInjective(' | ', first_name, last_name) FROM test_table ORDER BY full_name;
SELECT concatWithSeparatorAssumeInjective('-', (SELECT first_name FROM test_table WHERE id = 1), (SELECT last_name FROM test_table WHERE id = 1));
